Senior Full-Stack Developer (Svelte / Node.js) — Remote (India preferred)

About the role:
We're hiring a senior full-stack developer to lead frontend architecture on our SaaS platform. You'll work across SvelteKit, Node.js, and PostgreSQL, partnering with product to ship customer-facing features end-to-end.

Required:
- 4+ years of professional full-stack experience
- Strong proficiency in Svelte / SvelteKit
- Production experience with Node.js and TypeScript
- Comfortable with PostgreSQL and SQL
- Experience designing and consuming REST APIs

Nice to have:
- Docker / containerization
- AWS or GCP
- Experience with TanStack Query
- A history of mentoring junior engineers

Tech stack: Svelte, SvelteKit, Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS, GitHub Actions, Playwright.

Location: Remote (we're a distributed team; preference for IST overlap).

Compensation: 25-40 LPA depending on experience.
